to start a business of their choice. The scheme is designed to increase economic independence and livelihood generation among backward class women.

online: Fill out the application form with accurate personal and scheme-specific details.

documents_required: (Aadhaar card, Voter ID, Birth Certificate, etc.)

faqs.question: What is the New Swarnima Scheme?
faqs.answer: A loan scheme for Rabari and Bharwad women to start self-employment ventures. Rabari and Bharwad women

faqs.question: Who is eligible to apply?
faqs.answer: Women from Rabari or Bharwad castes, aged 21–45 , with income under ₹3 lakh/year. aged 21–45

faqs.question: What is the maximum loan amount?
Is there any subsidy or grant in the scheme?
faqs.answer: No subsidy , but interest is subsidized at 5% per annum. No subsidy

faqs.question: Is collateral required?
faqs.answer: No collateral is mentioned in the scheme guidelines. No collateral

faqs.question: Can I use the loan for any type of business?
faqs.answer: Yes, any legal small business or trade. Yes,

faqs.question: Can a man apply under this scheme?
faqs.answer: No, only eligible women can apply. No,

faqs.question: What is the rate of interest?
Is it necessary to belong to a backward class?
faqs.answer: Yes, only socially and educationally backward Rabari and Bharwad castes. Yes,

faqs.question: Where can I apply?
faqs.answer: To apply visit the official DAADC online portal. DAADC
